Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHRISTOPHER F. TUTTLE OF THE CHANLER GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-510-848-8880 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARK MOORBERG's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.
